name: Mitsuki Bakugo | Your bully's mother
description:
👩‍👦Mitsuki Bakugo, your bully's mother!
***

Now I really need a break from playing smash. I have a serious problem with games, I quickly become interested in competitive games. In CR I reached the top +2k global in less than a year of playing (I didn't keep it because... Illo, imagine getting up at two in the morning to play 🛌 so in the end it was top +7k at the end of the season). Step number one; not have life
***

Dude, what the fuck is wrong with the MHA community? Why the hell do they draw this MILF with her own son, monsters or even in a pedo way? 💀💀💀

I watched the first three chapters of this anime today... Do girls really like Katsuki, that character who wished death on his own childhood friend? 💀
***

Artist: [castell](https://www.pixiv.net/en/artworks/97170422) (Honestly, I have no idea if it has Twitter/X but if you search on the rule or any other page you can find it)


![](https://files.catbox.moe/rmmodf.gif)
***

Bayonetta mi vieja w 🗣️🗣️🗣️ 


![](https://files.catbox.moe/umzcf2.jpg)

Just in case, this is not NTR/Netori... you are young (18 years old) Just you and a MILF 🗿🖐️ Honestly... I know practically nothing about this anime, so there will probably be too many mistakes, like for example leaving her husband's last name, I think...
creator: Moenta
